nasb.text: Now I, Daniel, alone saw the vision, while the men who were with me did not see the vision; nevertheless, a great dread fell on them, and they ran away to hide themselves.

esv.text: And I, Daniel, alone saw the vision, for the men who were with me did not see the vision, but a great trembling fell upon them, and they fled to hide themselves.

cnv.text: 獨有我但以理看見這異象，那些和我在一起的人都沒有看見，不過他們卻大大驚慌，逃跑躲藏起來了。

ccb.text: 只有我但以理看见了这异象，跟我在一起的人都没有看见，但他们极其恐惧，纷纷逃匿，
